description:
Fedora Media Writer is a tool that helps users put Fedora images on their portable drives such as flash disks.


Fixes
- Add CIMV2/WinAPI fallback when Windows Storage namespace is unavailable (Fixes #787)
- Show only download on zero drives (by @gridhead, fixes #862)
- Enable keyboard focus navigation on all interactive controls (by @gridhead, fixes #619 )
